gut.dm_text:
多謝你留言 🌿

見到你想了解腸胃調理～我整理咗一份《腸胃調理懶人包》俾你，圖片就喺下面，可以直接 save 起慢慢睇 👇

如果想我幫你睇下你係邊種體質、點調理得貼身啲，可以 WhatsApp 我 wa.me/85252417448 😊
gut.public_ack: send咗份腸胃調理懶人包俾你喇，記得查下 DM 🌿

濕熱.dm_text:
收到你嘅留言 🌿

濕熱體質好常見，通常會口苦、口氣重、易攰、皮膚易出問題。想知自己係咪濕熱、點調理，WhatsApp 我傾下啦：wa.me/85252417448 😊

knee.dm_text:
Hey! Saw your comment — I've put together my TCM Knee Pain guide just for you 🌿

The images below break down why your knees are struggling and exactly what to do about it from a TCM perspective. Save them!

If you want me to take a closer look at your specific situation, just reply here and let's chat 👇

detox.dm_text:
Hey, I'm Jackie 🌿 Thanks for commenting.

Quick TCM detox tip: detox is not about flushing your body — it's about helping Qi move and reducing damp buildup. For the next 3 days, keep dinners lighter, avoid fried/greasy food, and drink warm water instead of iced drinks.

If you want the detailed detox guide images to save and refer to, reply GUIDE and I'll send them here 👇
detox.public_ack: I've sent you the TCM detox guide — check your DM! 🌿

tonsil.dm_text:
Hey! Glad you reached out 🌿

Tonsil stones are way more common than people realise — and from a TCM perspective, they're a signal of too much heat in the stomach and lungs. The good news: it's very manageable.

I've put together a guide with what to do. Images are below — save them!

Want to tell me more about what you're experiencing? Reply here and I'll help you figure out the right direction 👇
tonsil.public_ack: I've sent you the tonsil stone guide — check your DM! 🌿
